author: Rana Usman
name: Systematic Exploration: Deep Supervision, LR Tuning, Architecture (M4 MacBook)
blurb: Non-record M4 MacBook submission: 27 experiments across deep supervision, learning rate tuning, batch scaling, architecture changes, and convergence techniques. Best: 1.6414 int8_bpb via LR 0.08 at 128K batch. Found deep supervision gives -0.05 BPB at equal batch size (novel technique), LR 0.08 beats default by -0.025, and grad clipping helps -0.019.
